lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor blemishes, and the interior shows light wear from regular use. All mechanical components are in working order.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition and has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards. The exterior finish is flawless, with no scratches, dents, or blemishes, while the interior remains in showroom state with no signs of wear on the upholstery or dashboard. Mechanically, the car is perfect; the engine and transmission operate smoothly and quietly, and all electronic systems and features are fully functional. It has a complete service history and has been stored in a climate-controlled garage. This is an exceptional example of the model, offering a like-new driving experience for a discerning buyer.

This vehicle is in truly mint, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches or dents, and the interior is pristine, showing absolutely no signs of wear. Mechanically, it is perfect; the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts effortlessly. It has been garage-kept its entire life and comes with a full service history. This is a rare find for a collector or anyone seeking a car in like-new condition.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This car is in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth ride and reliable performance you can count on. It shows some light, expected wear from careful use, but it remains a solid and attractive choice for your next adventure.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior have significant damage and heavy signs of wear. There are known mechanical and electrical issues that require immediate repair.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning motorist. This unit exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure continued reliability. Both the exterior and interior finishes remain in commendable condition, reflecting a history of diligent stewardship. This offering balances sophisticated performance with long-term value, providing a refined driving experience.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolute gold to me. It’s in really nice shape, super reliable, and drives like a dream! I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road with its next owner today. It’s a fantastic deal for anyone looking for a solid, dependable car without the 'new car' price tag. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to a good home!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system. The powertrain is mated to a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock, providing exceptional mechanical grip and analog feedback. The chassis benefits from a reinforced rear subframe, addressing a known platform weak point, and maintains its composure through a meticulously tuned MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive valve adjustment and high-pressure VANOS service to ensure peak volumetric efficiency. While exhibiting minor aesthetic patina, the mechanical components—including the rod bearings and cooling system—are in robust operational health, offering a visceral 8,000 RPM redline experience.
Used sedan. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable performance.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents beautifully as a reliable, high-quality daily driver. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, though close inspection reveals a few minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with careful highway use. The body panels are straight with consistent gaps throughout. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; the upholstery is in great shape with only slight softening of the leather on the driver's side bolster, while the dashboard and trim remain free of cracks or fading. All electronic components, including the infotainment system and dual-zone climate control, function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is sound, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from regular, documented oil changes. The brakes feel firm, and the tires have approximately 70% tread remaining. This is a well-cared-for example that offers a premium driving experience and long-term dependability.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Exhibiting commendable mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers a refined driving experience consistent with our rigorous standards for quality and performance. We invite you to acquire this distinguished example of automotive excellence, priced to reflect its significant market value and reliable history.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers reliable performance and executive-level comfort. Comprehensive inspections confirm its robust condition and operational excellence, ensuring substantial value and longevity for its next proprietor.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved—perfect for someone looking for a reliable car that still looks great on the road. You’re going to love how smooth it feels! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

This E92-generation M3 is a purist-spec example featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering 414 horsepower through eight individual throttle bodies to an 8,400 RPM redline. Power is managed via a tactile 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory M Variable Differential Lock for superior mechanical grip. The chassis remains sharp with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and multi-link rear suspension, providing exceptional lateral stability. This unit has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including a rod bearing service and throttle actuator replacement, ensuring the internal valvetrain remains robust. The bodywork shows minor road-derived patina, while the interior maintains structural integrity with only light compression on the seat bolsters, reflecting a vehicle that has been driven with respect and maintained with technical diligence.
Used vehicle in good condition. Mechanically sound. Recent service completed. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and performance. The exterior retains its original luster, showing only the lightest signs of careful use consistent with responsible ownership, while the interior remains a sanctuary of comfort with supple leather seating and a fully operational suite of modern technology. Mechanically, this car is in its prime; it has been serviced religiously at every interval, ensuring a smooth, responsive ride and absolute peace of mind for the next owner. From the precise handling to the quiet cabin, every detail has been preserved to provide a premium driving experience. It comes with a complete set of service records and tires with excellent tread depth, ready for the road ahead without hesitation.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and sophisticated engineering. This exceptional example has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Featuring a well-appointed interior and a robust drivetrain, it offers a premier driving experience for the discerning motorist. This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of luxury and utility, prepared for immediate delivery to its next proprietor.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that aligns with our dealership's exacting standards for quality and performance. A reliable investment for those who prioritize both value and sophistication.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me! Whether you're commuting or heading out for a weekend getaway, this car is ready for its next adventure. I've taken great care of it, and it's looking for a new home where it'll be appreciated just as much. Come take it for a spin!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering linear power delivery up to its 8,400 RPM redline. Equipped with eight individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing, the induction note and throttle response are unparalleled. The chassis is anchored by a variable M differential lock and Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for precise lateral dynamics and suspension damping. This example has been meticulously maintained with a focus on preventative mechanical longevity, including documented rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators. The 7-speed M-DCT dual-clutch transmission provides lightning-fast gear synchronization, ensuring the high-revving powerband is always accessible. A driver-focused machine in honest, well-sorted condition,
Reliable daily driver. Body in good shape. Clean interior. Recent maintenance completed. Solid runner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, you'll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring well-preserved upholstery and fully operational climate and infotainment systems. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; it has been serviced regularly according to the manufacturer's schedule, ensuring the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts seamlessly. With a clean title and a detailed maintenance log, this car provides a premium driving experience and long-term reliability. It is a solid, honest example of a well-loved vehicle ready for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, which exemplifies consistent maintenance and mechanical reliability. Featuring a well-preserved exterior and a refined interior, this unit offers a superior driving experience and remains in commendable condition. A premier choice for the sophisticated buyer seeking a balance of performance and enduring value.

This distinguished vehicle offers a refined driving experience, characterized by its well-preserved mechanical integrity and sophisticated aesthetic. Meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance, it presents an exceptional value proposition for those seeking a balance of luxury and reliability. A premier selection for the discerning motorist.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's ready for its next adventure? This car has been such a joy to own and is still in really solid shape! It’s been well-cared for, runs beautifully, and has plenty of life left in it. It's the perfect balance of quality and value for someone who wants a dependable vehicle without the brand-new price tag. I'd love for you to come take it for a spin—I think you're really going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six engine, delivering high-revving performance through its six individual throttle bodies. Power is sent to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a recent inspection of the rear subframe mounting points and refreshed bushings. Equipped with a double-VANOS system for optimized torque across the powerband, this specimen offers a visceral driving experience. The suspension geometry is dialed in, ensuring precise turn-in and lateral stability. A mechanically sound example ready for the twisties.
Good condition. Clean title. Maintenance current. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior finish retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only minor road wear consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium upholstery is free of tears, and the dashboard remains pristine with all digital displays and controls functioning exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule—including a recent full fluid flush and brake inspection. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the suspension provides a firm yet comfortable ride. Whether you are commuting or heading out on a long road trip, this car offers the reliability and comfort you expect from a high-caliber pre-owned vehicle. It comes with a complete service history and has been kept in a smoke-free, pet-free environment.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliability and sophisticated engineering. This exceptional unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a well-appointed interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a refined driving experience. We invite discerning buyers to acquire this high-caliber automobile, representing a premier value proposition in its segment.
